ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours the course carries */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the instructor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback session */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* ID of the course the session belongs to */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the feedback session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., Open, Closed, Awaiting) */,
  "responses" INTEGER /* Number of responses received for the session */,
  "response_rate" TEXT /* Response rate of the session */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session type */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the feedback session */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the feedback session */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who created the session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the session was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_sessions_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_sessions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_sessions_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES session_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the session type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the session type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the session type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of the question (e.g., multiple choice, open-ended) */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the question is required */,
  "options" TEXT /* For multiple-choice questions, a JSON array of options */,
  "max_length" INTEGER /* Maximum length of the response for open-ended questions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_questions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES feedback_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the response belongs to */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who submitted the response */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the response */,
  "submitted_at" TEXT /* Date and time the response was submitted */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the response is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES session_questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "year_of_study" TEXT /* Year of study of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the action belongs to */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the action (e.g., Edit, Delete, Publish Results) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES feedback_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the reminder belongs to */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who received the reminder */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date the reminder was sent */,
  "is_sent" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the reminder has been sent */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reminder was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reminders_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reminders_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES feedback_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the result belongs to */,
  "result_text" TEXT /* Text of the result */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the results */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES feedback_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publish_results" (
  "publish_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publish event */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the publish event belongs to */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the results were published */,
  "published_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who published the results */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the results are public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publish_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publish_results_published_by FOREIGN KEY ("published_by") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publish_results_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES feedback_sessions ("session_id")
)
